title: Streaming parquet dataloader warns when worker count equals shard count
comments: Need a clearer rule for num_shards and dataloader workers.
body: Training with streaming parquet data is slow and the worker warning remains confusing.

title: Docs disagree on progress bar environment variable name
body: The documentation says one env var while code and warnings use another.

title: Fix Dataset.map writer initialization when first examples return None
body: Fixes a crash in Dataset.map when early examples return no update.

title: Dataset.map crashes when initial examples return None
body: Dataset.map raises an exception because the writer is not initialized after empty early rows.

title: Map writer crashes after None examples in first batch
comments: Looks related to the writer initialization issue.
body: The first batch has None outputs and a later row crashes the writer.

title: Private dataset token refresh fails after cache restore
body: A restored cache can leave stale token state and private downloads fail.

title: CLI should show dataset download retry attempts
comments: Would help debug flaky network jobs.
body: Users need a concise retry summary for download failures.

title: Support nested sub-issue summaries in issue exports
body: Issue exports should preserve nested sub-issue summary fields.

title: Large JSONL import causes memory spike on Windows
body: Large JSONL files on Windows trigger memory growth and eventual failure.

title: README typo in quickstart install command
body: A closed typo fix should not enter the sprint.
